name: Slide Right
description: New page enters from right while the current page exits leftward. Ideal for hierarchical navigation — feels like moving forward through a stack.
demoAnimations: @keyframes slide-right-out { from { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } to { transform: translateX(-40px); opacity: 0; } } @keyframes slide-right-in { from { transform: translateX(40px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } } .slide-right-out { animation: slide-right-out 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94) forwards; } .slide-right-in { animation: slide-right-in 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94) forwards; }

manualFiles.name: transitions/slide-right/transition.css
